mapper.sql: id, employee_id, certificate_type, copies, purpose, status, request_date, completed_date, remarks, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM certificate_requests WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY request_date DESC
SELECT FROM certificate_requests WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY request_date DESC
SELECT FROM certificate_requests WHERE certificate_type = #{certificateType} ORDER BY request_date DESC
SELECT FROM certificate_requests WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY request_date
mapper.update: UPDATE certificate_requests SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, certificate_type = #{certificateType}, copies = #{copies}, purpose = #{purpose}, status = #{status}, request_date = #{requestDate}, completed_date = #{completedDate}, remarks = #{remarks}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM certificate_requests WHERE id = #{id})
